# GroupDocs MCP Core

Core infrastructure NuGet packages consumed by every GroupDocs product MCP server (Metadata, Parser, Viewer, Conversion, etc.).

## Packages (all released together, CalVer YY.MM.N)

- GroupDocs.Mcp.Core — abstractions: IFileStorage, IFileResolver, ILicenseManager, McpConfig, DI builder
- GroupDocs.Mcp.Local.Storage — local filesystem IFileStorage
- GroupDocs.Mcp.AwsS3.Storage — Amazon S3 IFileStorage with presigned URLs
- GroupDocs.Mcp.AzureBlob.Storage — Azure Blob IFileStorage with SAS URLs

## Key links

- NuGet (Core): https://www.nuget.org/packages/GroupDocs.Mcp.Core
- Repository: https://github.com/groupdocs/GroupDocs.Mcp.Core
- License: MIT
- .NET: net8.0 + net10.0
- Versioning: CalVer YY.MM.N, single shared version for all four packages

## Environment variables (read by AddLocalStorage)

- GROUPDOCS_MCP_STORAGE_PATH — base folder for input + output
- GROUPDOCS_MCP_OUTPUT_PATH — optional, output folder override
- GROUPDOCS_LICENSE_PATH — path to GroupDocs.Total.lic, omit for evaluation mode

## See also

- Product servers that depend on this: groupdocs-metadata-mcp, groupdocs-parser-mcp, groupdocs-viewer-mcp, groupdocs-conversion-mcp, and 9 more.
- Framework spec: https://github.com/groupdocs/groupdocs-mcp-framework
